expect: dispatch_optimizer --no-collision excludes domains with ACTIVE/CLAIMED/READY/BLOCKED lanes while preserving the order of remaining candidates
actual: PARTIALLY FALSIFIED. With active lane DOMEX-META-S543-ARTIFACTS in meta, --no-collision printed 'Filtered active-lane domains (--no-collision): meta' and removed meta from the dispatch set. The remaining order changed: expert-swarm moved ahead of stochastic-processes.
diff: Filtering behavior matched the expectation, but order preservation did not. Collision suppression causes a re-rank of the remaining candidates rather than a stable filtered view.
